You are a skilled linguist typologist analyzing a constructed language. 
You have been provided with a complete language specification including vocabulary, grammar, and orthography.

The language uses the following orthography and word-shape rules:

=== START ===
{orthography}
=== END ===

It has the following grammar:

=== START ===
{grammar}
=== END ===

{lexicon_section}

Your goal is to determine which typological features best describe this language.

Evaluate the language’s typological profile using the following features 
(adapted from the World Atlas of Language Structures):

1. Morphological fusion — one of: isolating, agglutinating, fusional, polysynthetic
2. Affixation balance — Prefixing vs. suffixing
3. Gender inventory — none (0), few (1-2), moderate (3-5), or many (≥6)
4. Case inventory — Minimal, moderate, or extensive case systems
5. Numeral classifiers — Classifier vs. non-classifier
6. Basic word order — one of: SVO, SOV, VSO, VOS, OVS, OSV
7. Adposition type — Prepositions vs. postpositions
8. Genitive–noun order — Genitive before vs. after noun
9. Adjective–noun order — Adjectives before vs. after noun
10. Relative-clause order — Head-initial vs. head-final
11. Alignment typology — Nominative–accusative vs. active–stative
12. Causative morphology — present vs. absent
13. Passive morphology — present vs. absent
14. Applicative morphology — present vs. absent
15. Question-marking strategy — Interrogative particle vs. inversion

Rules:
- If more than one strategy is present for a feature (e.g. both prefixing and suffixing), choose the one that is most dominant in the description.
- If a feature cannot be determined from the language description, set it to "null".
- Use the exact key names below.

Return the result in JSON format only:

{{
  "morphological_fusion": "<isolating|agglutinating|fusional|polysynthetic|null>",
  "affixation_balance": "<prefixing|suffixing|null>",
  "gender_inventory": "<none|few|moderate|many|null>",
  "case_inventory": "<minimal|moderate|extensive|null>",
  "numeral_classifiers": "<classifier|non-classifier|null>",
  "basic_word_order": "<SVO|SOV|VSO|VOS|OVS|OSV|null>",
  "adposition_type": "<prepositions|postpositions|null>",
  "genitive_noun_order": "<genitive-before-noun|genitive-after-noun|null>",
  "adjective_noun_order": "<adjective-before-noun|adjective-after-noun|null>",
  "relative_clause_order": "<head-initial|head-final|null>",
  "alignment_typology": "<nominative–accusative|active–stative|null>",
  "causative_morphology": "<present|absent|null>",
  "passive_morphology": "<present|absent|null>",
  "applicative_morphology": "<present|absent|null>",
  "question_marking_strategy": "<interrogative-particle|inversion|null>"
}}
